name: wardrowbe
description: Root scripts for the Wardrowbe monorepo (shared packages + mini program tests)

scripts.test:packages: npm test --prefix packages/shared-api && npm test --prefix packages/shared-domain && npm test --prefix packages/shared-i18n && npm test --prefix packages/shared-services && npm test --prefix wechat-miniapp
scripts.test:packages:ci: npm ci --prefix packages/shared-api && npm test --prefix packages/shared-api && npm ci --prefix packages/shared-domain && npm test --prefix packages/shared-domain && npm ci --prefix packages/shared-i18n && npm test --prefix packages/shared-i18n && npm ci --prefix packages/shared-services && npm test --prefix packages/shared-services && npm ci --prefix wechat-miniapp && npm test --prefix wechat-miniapp
